title: Perform flanking cuts
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform flanking cuts demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Split hides or pelts

pcs.text: Correctly split hides or pelts in accordance with work instructions.1.2 Split hides or pelts avoiding contamination and puncturing.1.3 Split hides or pelts in accordance with workplace health and safety and workplace requirements.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Correctly split hides or pelts in accordance with work instructions.1.2 Split hides or pelts avoiding contamination and puncturing.1.3 Split hides or pelts in accordance with workplace health and safety and workplace requirements?

elements.title: Flank the carcase

pcs.text: Flank carcase in accordance with work instructions.2.2 Flank carcase using a knife or air knife with both left and right hand sides flanked.2.3 Flank carcase without damage to the hides or pelts or contamination of the carcase.2.4 Remove hides or pelts from the area in accordance with workplace health and safety requirements.
